name: GOLFTEC Chandler
about: GOLFTEC Chandler is a part of the national GOLFTEC chain focused on data-driven golf improvement. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion analysis, high-speed video, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching and club fitting. Lessons are structured around a proven system designed to help golfers of all skill levels improve faster through detailed swing analysis and personalized game plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION swing tracking and launch monitors for precise feedback
Personalized improvement plans with data-driven coaching from PGA-certified instructors
Integrated club fitting services with access to top brands and shaft optimization technology

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology used for fitting and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you're welcome to bring your own equipment for use during sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or beverages are permitted in the facility. The focus is on training and coaching without distractions.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: Rounds typically take 45-60 minutes depending on the number of players and pace of play, with some flexibility depending on the technology used.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers, with technology and coaching methods adapted for younger players looking to improve their game.
